name: Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble pork sausage into a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Cover with paper towel and microwave on high for 7 to 9 minutes, breaking up the sausage and stirring after 4 minutes until no longer pink. Drain excess fat if needed.
3. Stir in chili powder, salt, ground cumin, coarsely chopped tomato, and crushed garlic.
4. Cover tightly and microwave for an additional 3 to 5 minutes or until hot.
5. Place 4 tortillas between damp paper towels on a plate. Microwave on high for 1 to 2 minutes or until softened and hot (keep covered while working with filling).
6. Spread about 1/4 cup refried beans over each warm tortilla.
7. Spoon about 1/3 cup sausage mixture onto the center of each tortilla; sprinkle with 2 tablespoons shredded cheddar cheese on top.
8. Roll up each burrito, seam sides down, and arrange them seam side down on a plate.
9. Cover with paper towel and microwave for an additional 4 to 5 minutes or until filling is hot.
10. Repeat steps 5-9 with remaining tortillas and filling.
